rationale: Both correctly diagnose the diffusion-side get_cache_scale call site as the missed 5th spot from #4810 and correctly recommend closing as duplicate, matching the thread's actual resolution. X confidently asserts #4808 is merged and already fixes main, even fabricating an exact 'already present' code comment as evidence, and its short disposition line misattributes duplicate status to #4809 rather than #4808. Y correctly ties the duplicate to #4808 (with #4809 as tracking issue), explicitly flags that #4808 shows CLOSED/mergedAt-null and asks for confirmation rather than asserting an unverified fact, and backs its claims with specific line-level citations plus an honest caveat about what its checkout could and couldn't verify.
